docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WINTER, JOSHUA J. AS TO DEFENDANT BIERBOWER, DANIEL J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE AND REQUEST TO RESET TRIAL DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINTER, JOSHUA J.
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-16-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-18-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-07-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BIERBOWER, DANIEL J.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, 1381 9TH AVE., SF CA 94122

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506). APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINTER, JOSHUA J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIERBOWER, DANIEL J. $853.64 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,003.64, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BIERBOWER, DANIEL J. HEARING SET FOR AUG-11-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINTER, JOSHUA J.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DANIEL J. BIERBOWER SET FOR AUG-11-2008 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-22-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM EDWARD HOLTZ FILED BY WINTER, JOSHUA J. BIERBOWER, DANIEL J.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: EDWARD HOLTZ. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-16-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PAYMENTS TO BE MADE DECEMBER 10, 2008 AND JANUARY 10, 2009. IF PAYMENTS NOT MADE CASE WILL BE HEARD BY COURT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE PRO TEM EDWARD HOLTZ. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NO APPEARANCES. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DANIEL J. BIERBOWER IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO OCT-10-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. DEFENDANT ACKNOWLEDGES SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. NO CONTINUANCES WITHOUT SHOWING OF GOOD CAUSE. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
